suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update baseline failure count from '10 pre-existing test failures' to '0 pre-existing test failures (all tests passing)'. The cleanup milestone resolved all remaining test failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: go test ./internal/kfx/... now shows 0 FAIL lines (was 10 before cleanup milestone). Reviews of fix-span-unwrapping-bug and update-stale-test-expectations both confirmed progressive reduction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update baseline diff counts from 'Martyr=1, Elvis=42, HG=38, ThreeBelow=10 (total=91)' to current values. The counts have changed due to prior feature implementations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of update-stale-test-expectations notes the AGENTS.md counts dated dd94a88 are stale. Current counts need verification with diff_report.sh.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about two-phase span unwrapping ordering dependency in simplifyStylesElementFull: (1) children processed recursively first (stripping per-child), then (2) parent checks for no-op spans. This ordering is critical for the unwrapping logic to work correctly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-span-unwrapping-bug review found this subtle ordering at lines 1416-1429 (recursive child processing), 1432-1451 (parent span unwrapping), 1535-1649 (child-level stripping).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the dual-check test pattern for new pipeline tests: check both inline HTML (got) and stylesheet (renderer.styles.String()) for CSS properties, since the pipeline now emits inline style= attributes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: update-stale-test-expectations established this pattern across 7 test updates: !strings.Contains(got, "property: value") && !strings.Contains(stylesheet, "property: value").

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the purpose and generation source of reference EPUBs: marty_calibre.epub is used for TestConvertFileMatchesReferenceStructureIgnoringImages (structural check, currently regenerated from Go output) vs /tmp/martyr_python_ref.epub used for diff_report.sh (conformance check against Python). These serve different purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: update-stale-test-expectations review noted the marty_calibre.epub was regenerated from Go output, making it a consistency check rather than a Python conformance check.

rejectedObservations.observation: fix-image-property-split feature description in features.json is stale (describes the original BLOCK_CONTAINER_PROPERTIES fix plan, but the feature ended up being a no-code-change investigation with documentation).
rejectedObservations.reason: features.json is a historical record managed by the orchestrator; workers should not modify feature descriptions retroactively. The handoff notes from the worker explain the outcome.
